name: Sailun Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Sailun Group Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, sells, and services tires in China. It provides car, SUV, LTR, winter, explosion-proof, and racing tires; truck, bus, and snow tires; and construction machinery, mining giant, and agricultural tires. The company was formerly known as Sailun Jinyu Group Co., Ltd. Sailun Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Qingdao, China.
